resources.name: Tribal Support Line
resources.description: Crisis counseling and support specifically for tribal communities. Available 24/7.

resources.name: Healing Circles Network
resources.description: Traditional healing practices combined with modern therapeutic approaches. Focuses on collective trauma recovery.

resources.name: Indigenous Youth Resilience Center
resources.description: Mentorship and counseling for indigenous youth to build resilience and cultural connection.

resources.name: Elder Wisdom Outreach
resources.description: Support services tailored for tribal elders, focusing on isolation and cultural preservation.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What is tribal mental health?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: A holistic approach that integrates traditional indigenous knowledge, cultural practices, and Western mental health services to promote well-being within tribal communities.

frequently_asked_questions.question: How can I access traditional healing?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Many tribal health centers provide traditional healing practitioners alongside medical doctors. You can contact your local tribal health board for referrals.
